title: Automatic date push

posts.author: Guylhv (Guy Lahav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to create an automation that pushes a date to the end of the same month.
To better explain - When an items is being crated the there is a column which gets the date for the item creation. Then I would like to have another column which will represent the last day of that month.

Any ideas?
